mnemonics.title: Candidate-Elimination Boundaries
mnemonics.content: **G**eneral is **G**uarded by negative examples (they make it more specific). **S**pecific is **S**tretched by positive examples (they make it more general).

mnemonics.title: Inductive Bias Need
mnemonics.content: **B**ias **B**ridges the gap between data and generalization. Without it, learning is **B**asically impossible (Too many options).
